AddNotificationChannels.description: Grants permission to add up to 2 topic ARNs of existing AWS SNS topics to publish notifications

BatchGetFrameMetricData.description: Grants permission to get the frame metric data for a Profiling Group

ConfigureAgent.description: Grants permission to register with the orchestration service and retrieve profiling configuration information, used by agents

CreateProfilingGroup.description: Grants permission to create a profiling group

DeleteProfilingGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a profiling group

DescribeProfilingGroup.description: Grants permission to describe a profiling group

GetFindingsReportAccountSummary.description: Grants permission to get a summary of recent recommendations for each profiling group in the account

GetNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get the notification configuration

GetPolicy.description: Grants permission to get the resource policy associated with the specified Profiling Group

GetProfile.description: Grants permission to get aggregated profiles for a specific profiling group

ListFindingsReports.description: Grants permission to list the available recommendations reports for a specific profiling group

ListProfileTimes.description: Grants permission to list the start times of the available aggregated profiles for a specific profiling group

ListProfilingGroups.description: Grants permission to list profiling groups in the account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a Profiling Group

PostAgentProfile.description: Grants permission to submit a profile collected by an agent belonging to a specific profiling group for aggregation

PutPermission.description: Grants permission to update the list of principals allowed for an action group in the resource policy associated with the specified Profiling Group

RemoveNotificationChannel.description: Grants permission to delete an already configured SNStopic arn from the notification configuration

RemovePermission.description: Grants permission to remove the permission of specified Action Group from the resource policy associated with the specified Profiling Group

SubmitFeedback.description: Grants permission to submit user feedback for useful or non useful anomaly

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add or overwrite tags to a Profiling Group

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a Profiling Group

UpdateProfilingGroup.description: Grants permission to update a specific profiling group

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
